content:
AI Became My Learning Partner
One thing I appreciate most is that AI adapts to my curiosity.
If I don’t understand an explanation, I can ask for another.
If I want an example in Java instead of TypeScript, I can ask.
If I want to compare two architectures, I can ask.
If I want to know why one solution is considered better than another, I can ask again.
There’s no limit to the number of questions.
And I think that’s one of the biggest revolutions in education.
Learning is no longer limited by access to information.
It’s limited by the quality of the questions we ask.
